subject: DZNep
evidence_span: DZNep inhibits the hydrolysis of S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine

subject: DZNep
evidence_span: DZNep is not specific to EZH2 and also inhibits other DNA methyltransferases

subject: EPZ005687
evidence_span: EPZ005687 inhibits EZH2 activity by binding to the SET domain active site

subject: EPZ005687
evidence_span: it has a 50-fold increase in selectivity for EZH2 compared to EZH1

subject: Tazemetostat
object: metastatic or locally advanced epithelioid sarcoma
evidence_span: tazemetostat gained an FDA accelerated approval for the treatment of metastatic or locally advanced epithelioid sarcoma

subject: Tazemetostat
evidence_span: tazemetostat gained an FDA accelerated approval for the treatment of patients with relapsed follicular lymphoma

subject: Sinefungin
evidence_span: Sinefungin is not specific to EZH2 and works by binding in the cofactor binding pocket of DNA methyltransferases

subject: EI1
evidence_span: EI1 showed EZH2 inhibitory activity in lymphoma tumor cells

subject: GSK126
evidence_span: GSK126 is a potent, SAM-competitive EZH2 inhibitor

subject: UNC1999
evidence_span: UNC1999 was developed as an analogue of GSK126

subject: Etoposide
object: non-small cell lung cancers with BRG1 and EGFR mutations
evidence_span: Etoposide, when combined with an EZH2 inhibitor, becomes more effective for non-small cell lung cancers with BRG1 and EGFR mutations

subject: EZH2
evidence_span: EZH2 and lysine methylation can have tumor suppressing activity, for example in myelodysplastic syndrome
